title: Oxidation
short: The loss of electrons by a species; its oxidation number increases.
full:
Oxidation is the loss of electrons. The species that loses electrons is oxidized and acts as the reducing agent. A handy memory aid is OIL RIG: Oxidation Is Loss, Reduction Is Gain.

Oxidation numbers track the electron bookkeeping: an increase in oxidation number signals oxidation. Oxidation never happens alone — every electron lost by one species is gained by another, so oxidation is always paired with reduction in a redox reaction.
